name: DynaVap The HyperDyn
summary: A large-chamber titanium butane-heated vaporiser for patients who want fuller DynaVap sessions.
description: The DynaVap HyperDyn is the big-chamber model in the range, with a roughly 0.25g titanium bowl for fuller sessions than the standard tips allow. It is built from medical-grade titanium with DuraDyn protection, and its 10mm and 14mm tapers let you draw through water pieces for a cooler hit. It stays compatible with existing DynaVap midsections, tips and mouthpieces, and includes a 0.125g dosing capsule for smaller doses. It still needs a butane torch (sold separately) and the same click-to-temperature technique — this is the choice for patients who already know DynaVap and want a larger capacity.
